results.content:

Nominees for the Best AI Workflow Automation Tools Orbit Award.Image 36
We re officially in nominees season for the Orbit Awards: AI Workflow Automation.

61 comments•8.9K views

5mo ago

Image 37: Aaron O'LearyAaron O'Leary

Image 38: Product Hunt Product Hunt

🔥 Best AI Automation Tools: Nominate Your Favorites for the Product Hunt Orbit AwardsImage 39
We just wrapped the Orbit Awards for AI Dictation and now we re moving to the next category: AI Automation.

This one is for the tools that actually do work for you clearing chores, running workflows in the background, or quietly taking over a chunk of your week without turning into another dashboard you have to babysit.

55 comments•7.7K views

6mo ago

Image 40: kshitijkshitij

Image 41: Inrō Inrō [...] about each tool.
   Insights from real _makers_.Founders from top companies launch On Product Hunt. We watch how they engage, what tools they use, and who's building to last.
   Community discussions.Our forums surface the nuanced takes, edge cases, workflow tips, and honest comparisons you won't find in marketing copy.
   Hands-on testing.We use these products ourselves. There's no substitute for actually living with a tool to understand its strengths and quirks.
   Track record and momentum. We look at how products evolve—consistent updates, responsive teams, and staying power matter.

The result is a curated list that reflects not just popularity, but genuine quality. If it's on this page, we'd recommend it to a friend. [...] ### Finance

AI Workflow Automation

No-Code AI Agent Builder

Lindy was awarded the Best Personal AI Assistant Award for AI Workflow Automation in Winter 2026 [...] #### What needs improvement

I keep forgetting to log into Lindy to find other ways and workflows I could automate. There's some friction for me in finding time to do the deep thinking to port my work over

#### vs Alternatives

I really like the simplicity and support from the team (the Slack has been a huge boon)

Ratings

Ease of use

Reliability

Value for money

Customization

Report

 179 views

•1 review

#### What's great [...] #### What needs improvement

The built-in AI that builds or fixes workflows for you sometimes doesn’t hit the mark. Be sure to make a duplicate of your build first before using the AI to make fixes.

#### vs Alternatives

I believe Lindy, with its no-code interface and pre-built library of workflows is the most accessible AI agent tool for me and my clients.
